negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_27b06fe9-6ffd-4c4e-92cb-f19f5c783d3a
prompt: The video showcases a modern building complex captured from an aerial perspective in a wide, high-angle shot that pans across the structure. The right portion of the building is rectangular and vertically oriented, with a brown facade featuring two large, rectangular windows on either side, both folding inward. Below these windows is a large, central window that also folds inward. Adjacent to this section is a structure made of black-framed glass panels, topped with a light-green material that extends to the neighboring building to its left. The roof of this building hosts two large, white, rectangular objects facing each other, which fold outward to connect with another rectangular structure elevated from the ground, casting a shadow below.  The left side of the building is divided into two parts, forming a corner in the middle, with square protrusions on each half. The roof is white, with a small building on its right corner. Surrounding the building is a snowy landscape, with three leafless trees on the snow-covered ground to the right and more snow-covered patches further along. In front of the building, a paved street is bordered by snow, leading to another paved street with three large, snow-covered patches on its left and leafless trees on soil on its right. The urban backdrop includes buildings, cars, and scattered trees, all bathed in natural daylight. The video is sped up, capturing the rapid movement of people walking in front of the building, adding a dynamic element to the serene winter scene.
